'''Hes Jor-Sharu''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[New Jedi Order]]. He discovered information about [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Phantom Squadron]] in the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Jor-Sharu later tracked down [[Col Serra]], the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron's]] commander, and asked him about Phantom Squadron. Serra told him about the squadron's exploits, including the [[Evacuation of Yavin]].

==Behind the scenes==
Hes Jor-Sharu was originally intended to appear in the video game ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''. In the final work, however, Jor-Sharu was replaced by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tionne Solusar]], and Phantom Squadron's name was changed to Renegade Squadron.
